title: After the Yasuda Kinen: A Triumphant Bath

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though disappointed by the loss, Ikuno Dictus
takes inspiration from how Matikanetannhauser
always tells herself, "Next time!" and looks
steadfastly to the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afteward, she invites Matikanetannhauser to a
bathhouse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Time to fully recover and focus on the next race!
